history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H. The path directly to the right is blocked by lava at row 02 column E, so I should not go forward. The safe route is to go down into the open area first, so I need to turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly below me at row 03 column B is safe floor, so moving forward is the best next step to start heading toward the open lower area and ultimately the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03 column B facing down. The cell in front of me at row 04 column B is safe, so I should continue forward to keep progressing through the open path.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell in front of me at row 05 column B is safe, so I should continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down. The cell in front of me at row 06 column B is safe, so I should keep moving forward toward the open area and goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell in front of me at row 07 column B is safe, so continuing forward is the best next step.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column B facing down. The cell in front of me at row 08 column B is safe, and moving there keeps me heading toward the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 08 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 09 column B is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal at row 08 column H, I should turn right to face the open path along row 08.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right. The goal is to the east along the same row, and the next cell at row 08 column C is safe, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column C facing right. The goal is still to the east, and the next cell at row 08 column D is safe, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column D facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H, and the cells ahead at E, F, G, and H are all on the path. The next safe step is forward into row 08 column E.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column E facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H. The next cell to the right, row 08 column F, is safe, so I should continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column F facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H. The next cell forward, row 08 column G, is safe, so I should keep moving forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column G facing right. The goal is immediately ahead at row 08 column H, so I should move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
